nasb.text: He flies away like a dream, and they cannot find him; Even like a vision of the night he is chased away.

esv.text: He will fly away like a dream and not be found; he will be chased away like a vision of the night.

cnv.text: 他必如夢一般飛逝，人再也找不著他， 他必被趕去如夜間的異象，

ccb.text: 他如梦消逝，踪影杳然； 如夜间的异象，飞逝而去。
